title: あいさつバクシン運動です！！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, I'm welcomed by a shrill and
energetic voice in front of the academy gate.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: GOOD MORNING!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being greeted in such an explosive manner at
point-blank range makes me reflexively take a
number of steps backward.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm gracing you with a Bakushin Greeting!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's a student council initiative to instill the
importance of proper manners into our students.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The original idea was rather hands-off. We were
only going to hang posters that encouraged
students to greet each other more...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But big Bakushin results are always better than
slow progress, so I—the class
representative—proposed to take a more direct
approach!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As such, I'm greeting everyone immediately upon
their arrival! I've dubbed this initiative as "The
Bakushin Greeting"! It's sure to instill the
importance of greetings upon others!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Given that it's a student council campaign, I'm
here to oversee its implementation, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well... Stay here and watch a while, and you'll
see.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, so another observer shall be taking notes
on my Bakushin Greetings, eh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Very well! Keep your eyes open and observe well!
BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I stick around to watch Sakura Bakushin
O act out her Bakushin Greeting initiative.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: GOOD MORNING!

text_block_list.name: Shy Student
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Wh-why are you yelling at me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I am simply giving you a Bakushin Greeting! You
there! GOOD MORNING TO YOU TOO!

text_block_list.name: Sleepy Student
text_block_list.text:
It's way too early in the morning for—h-hey, back
up a little!

text_block_list.name: Shy Student
text_block_list.text:
I-if you want us to remember to greet each
other... I think a gentle reminders plenty!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As you can see, she is quite... passionate about
her role.
choice_data_list: I think you might be going a bit overboard.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Overboard?! But do you not see how my
passionate greetings are setting everyone's hearts
ablaze the moment they step on campus?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, how do I put this? I'm afraid you might be
putting people off.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I can tell how motivated you are to do this, and
part of me wants to let you carry on as is...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But the purpose here isn't to make the students
shy away...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see! In other words, my greetings require even more Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems dead set on her approach, but there
has to be another way she can express her passion
without stressing out the students!
choice_data_list: What if you try using gestures instead?
Why don't you come up with a catchy slogan?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that she try waving or striking a friendly
pose at people instead of raising her voice at
them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Body language, huh? Yes, a true class
representative should be fluent in this most
universal of languages! Only then can I transcend
all barriers!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good! Morning! Good! Morning! Goooood!
Morniiing!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's good. Let your movements make up for
your lowered voice. And do your best to stay put!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll be back later to see how you're doing, but if
anything goes awry before then, come find me
immediately.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I was so shocked when Air Groove said my
method was off-putting!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But Bakushin is here to save the day! Time to
begin my NEW AND IMPROVED Universal
Bakushin Greeting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that using a friendly slogan at a
reasonable volume may be sufficient to express
the importance of greeting others.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A catchphrase! Making one is a huge
responsibility indeed! But it's precisely the kind of
crucial task a class representative must perform!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Good... Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh! It's an expression that encapsulates both the
feeling of a friendly greeting and the feeling of
Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good Bakushin! And good Bakushin to you as
well!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure this will do the trick? She's just as
raucous as before...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, I'll come back later to see
how you're doing, but if anything goes awry
before then, come find me immediately.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right, my catchphrase is helping the students
understand my purpose!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I've got to keep it up and share my Bakushin
energy with all who pass through these gates!
